description: A photograph depicting a dirt track running parallel to a calm water body, likely a river or canal, under a partly cloudy sky. To the left of the track is a dense line of green deciduous trees, forming a forest edge. To the right, between the track and the water, is a strip of green grassland. On the far side of the water body, more trees are visible, and a bridge can be seen in the distance. The image is copyrighted "©European Union, 2017" and attributed to "LUCAS" (Land Use/Cover Area frame Survey). This scene illustrates land cover types such as "8.1.1.0 Natural & semi-natural water courses" or "8.1.2.0 Highly Modified Natural Water Courses and Canals", adjacent to "4.2.1.x Semi-natural grassland" or "4.1.0.0 Managed grassland", and "3.x.x.x Forest" as mentioned in the CLC+ (next-generation land cover/land use) nomenclature guidelines.
